授業目的:
1.    To
acquire a well-structured research and analysis skill on current global
financial markets and in Asian context;2.    To
keep abreast of global developments and adapt to changing financial market trends;



3.
To develop cross cultural awareness and understand the importance of future
innovative trends in the Asian financial services industry.
到達目標:
ILO
1: To apply traditional and new analysis of financial market to the East Asian economies
and the region as a whole

ILO
2: To familiarize students with the use of Asian financial market, investment,
capital funding and economic development data to Asian businesses and the
region as a whole

ILO
3: To familiarize students with the institutional features of various Asian
countries and develop global and regional outlook

 

By
the end of this course, you’ll be able to define and evaluate Asian financial
markets, understand the evolution of market trends, identify the benefits of
global strategy for your company, and quantify economic and financial market
trends in major Asian financial centers.
授業方法:
Online format. There
is no standard textbook for this course. Lecture notes, slides and some reading
materials will be distributed electronically to all students. Some reading materials
will be available online. The rest of the reading materials will be available
in the library or distributed in class. While
this credit-based IMC course focuses on critical and timely issues facing
various Asian financial markets, the topics to be covered include global
financial systems and policies and current major developments of primary and
secondary markets in major Asian financial centers such as Hong Kong, Shanghai,
Tokyo, and Singapore. In addition, comparative references will also be made. This
course is made up of seven lessons content including lecturing, in-class
discussions, video lectures, individual presentation, and an in-class written exam assessment.

第1回:
Introduction & Overview of the course;

Why study financial markets and institutions?

Foundations, introduction to global financial markets and system.
第2回:
The role of central bank in financial markets;

Globalization and market linkages.
第3回:
The links between global markets and principal players;

Paper Discussion.
第4回:
Introduction to Asian financial markets and impact from globalization;

Overview of the Asian financial systems and institutions;

Policy, Structural, and Macro Issues.
第5回:
China-Asian market interactions: changing perspectives;

Case Discussion;
第6回:
Asian financial centers: the Global competitiveness and most important factors for competitiveness of global financial centers;


Hong Kong vs. Singapore
第7回:
Understanding the geopolitical implications of the global financial crisis;

Emerging Southeast Asia.
第8回:
The future of money, markets and the New Physics of Financial Services: How artificial intelligence is transforming the financial ecosystem;

Analyze and discuss the impact of AI technology and Fintech.
第9回: Selected Topics: Financial Services

成績評価Grading0: 評価基準等　Grading Criteria etc.
成績評価Grading1: Quiz and selected case studies (8th session)
成績評価Grading3: 授業への参加度（自発性、積極性、主体性、等）／In-class participation,contribution (09)
Participation, contribution to the class discussions
